title: Buckets
description: spill, blink and other infrequent animations; aligned bucket pixels between different items; axolotl and tropical fish variant textures for 1.21.5+; sulfur cube variant textures for 26.2+; personal improvements
body:
![all buckets preview (0.3.1)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kfFeFYkM/images/acb5e7c9e9213e468ca5f3ccd8566cb36f723c9b.gif)

# what is affected
- occasional blink and spill animations to fish buckets (and dive for tadpole and clap for axolotl, i can write it more in detail but the gif above speaks itself)
- occasional liquid spill animation for water, lava, milk and powder snow buckets
- a "fix" where fish buckets are aligned to the bottom to fit the fish better but I find the inconsistency very annoying so I aligned the rest of the buckets at the bottom as well
- axolotl bucket variant (lucy, wild, gold, cyan, blue) textures for Minecraft 1.21.5 and above versions
- tropical fish bucket variant (all 3072) textures for Minecraft 1.21.5 and above versions
- sulfur cube bucket variant (for blocks that can be placed in sulfur cubes) textures for Minecraft 26.2 and above versions

# warnings
- milk bucket: if you are using the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/project/o962rBDR) resource pack, put this (Buckets) resource pack above it so both work properly
  - known issue: if you start drinking mid animation, running animation frame will be stuck until running frame duration finishes and next frame begins
- animations: if you are using [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/project/AANobbMI) and probably other similar mods, there is an option to render item animations only when determined visible by player. This often causes the animations to stuck on frames longer than they should

# maintainability
- I look forward to update whenever I do changes on it, so it builds overtime with my personal touch and maintain compatibility on new versions.
- Minecraft versions before 1.20 may show a warning but the resources behave as expected.

# next step
- make this description more appealing
- probably gonna improve simple water animations, they feel too simple/weak/cheap at the moment
